name: Dundee Tabletop Playtesting Meetup
description:
Every 2nd Wednesday of the month @ Cake or Dice from 5 - 9pm. Find us with the big crochet meeple!

The new event will usually be posted around the start of the month.

This is a casual meetup for playtesting tabletop games, from board games, to card games, to TTRPGs and more. If you have a game you'd like to playtest, or you'd like to help playtest other people's games, we'd love to have you!
short_description: Monthly tabletop playtesting meetup at Cake or Dice, Dundee — board games, card games, TTRPGs and more.
